sany.note: N/A — artifact is HTML/CSS/JS, not TLA+.

tlc.note: N/A — no state machine in this packet; the methodology's own Model.tla is the closest analog and was not changed.

temporal_properties_checked: HoverRevealsDetail — for each of 7 stages, the .stage-detail block becomes visible after :hover or <details open>.

baseline.i18n_anglicism: FAIL — 4 banned tokens in data-lang=ru: Evidence, пайплайн, Рефинемент (x2)
baseline.HeroBadgeFitsText: FAIL — oversize=799.5px (root cause: div[data-lang]{display:none !important} was overridden by setLang() into display:block, and box-sizing border-box with width: 100% parent)
baseline.StageHasAllFields: FAIL — pipeline had 7 pipeline-step children with no icon, no detail, no hover state

post_refactor.i18n_anglicism: PASS — 0 banned tokens; ru strings now use Конвейер, Уточнение, Свидетельства, факультативен, эфемерен, проверенный
post_refactor.HeroBadgeFitsText: PASS — oversize=26.0px (padding 24px + border 2px around 193px text). Fix: .hero-badge now has width: max-content and setLang() preserves display: inline-block for hero-badge specifically.
post_refactor.StageHasAllFields: PASS — 7 stage-card elements, each with stage-num, stage-icon, 3 stage-name locales, stage-file, stage-detail
post_refactor.NoVerifiedEvidenceSection: PASS — 0 elements matching .proof-grid or .proof-card. Section replaced with compact verified-chips strip reusing the four packet icons.

verdict_rationale: All mechanical checks (L1 gate, headless DOM invariants) pass with real evidence in test-i18n.log and test-dom.log. The artifact under test is HTML/CSS/JS, so TLC does not apply; the methodology's own L2/L3 tiers are not relevant for this packet. The contract in Model.tla documents the L1 invariants and they hold.
warnings: i18n check covers only the BANNED list in test-i18n.mjs. A full linguistic review is not in scope.
Visual screenshot evidence is in screenshots/ — three locales full-page, plus per-section crops for hero, pipeline, verified strip.
